examples: He stepped out to buy a quart of milk.
In a quart pitcher, dissolve the sugar and salt in the hot water.
Which has a higher boiling point, a quart of water or a gallon of water?
He began serving drinks in 16-inch-tall glasses that hold just shy of a quart.
Transfer the mixture to an 11- or 12-quart copper preserving pan or a wide nonreactive kettle.
